1: Well, it seems you hit an asteroid.
At the bottom-left screen you have a radar.
You are travelling at inconceivable speeds.
Your eyes can't warn you. Only the radar can.
2: It seems you wandered too far away.
Space is vast, and the only way to get directions is through radio beacons.
Going too far from the beacons will shut down the navigation system.
There is a navigator in the top left screen. Follow it.
3: No matter how powerful a fuel is, travelling so fast expends it quickly.
Limit the use of the afterburner. It consumes a lot of fuel.
Stay on course, and don't be impatient.
4: When passing an asteroid cloud, you could hit an engine.
Always use the radar on the bottom right.
And if things go wrong, extinguish it in time.
5: If you hit multiple asteroids, you might destroy both engines.
This leaves you stranded and your systems off.
Always use the radar. It's the only thing that can warn you.
6: You dropped your cargo too early.
Anyway, the customers can track the delivery.
They will not be very satisfied, will they?
Don't play with any button, and only click the red ones when lit.
